title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked a mixed-provider workflow combining Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 for code generation tasks. Using Archon, he tested four configurations across three GitHub issues to determine optimal provider allocation for planning versus implementation, evaluating results on seven dimensions including correctness and code quality.
